title: Fix dynamic array elements passed to ref argument

features.name: dynamic_array_element_passed_to_ref_argument
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array element (da[i]) being passed to a ref argument of a function

features.name: method_with_ref_arg_receiving_dynamic_array_element
features.description: Code should include a class method with a ref argument that receives a dynamic array element, where the method incorrectly uses 'at' instead of 'atWrite' for the lvalue access

features.name: at_method_on_dynamic_array_lvalue
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array element being used as an lvalue in a context where the 'at' method is incorrectly emitted instead of 'atWrite'
